channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Portugal reach last 16 after VAR decision; Spain advance and World Cup knockout updates continue
item.description: This live World Cup 2026 update covers major developments from the knockout stage as Portugal and Spain progress amid high drama and controversy. Portugal secured their place in the last 16 after a ti...

item.title: Vintage 1970s Photos Highlight Jerry Hall’s Rise as a Supermodel
item.description: This article presents a curated collection of 30 vintage photographs showcasing Jerry Hall during her rise to fame in the 1970s. Born in 1956, Hall emerged as one of the defining supermodels of the de...

item.title: Tesla introduces six-seater long-wheelbase Model Y L in the United States market
item.description: Tesla has recently launched a six-seater version of its popular Model Y SUV with an extended wheelbase, known as the Model Y L, in the United States. This move aims to increase demand for its electric...

item.title: Congress seeks Supreme Court-monitored inquiry into alleged irregularities in Ram Temple donation case
item.description: The Congress party has called for a Supreme Court-monitored investigation into allegations of embezzlement of donations made to the Ram Temple in Ayodhya. In a letter addressed to Prime Minister Naren...

item.title: Spring Strawberry, Burrata and Endive Salad Recipe with Herb Dressing
item.description: This feature presents a fresh seasonal salad recipe showcasing spring strawberries paired with creamy burrata cheese and crisp endive. Developed as part of the Simply Delicious series, the dish is dem...

item.title: Meru County to Explore Banana Stem-Based Organic Hair Production Amid Health and Environmental Claims
item.description: The Governor of Meru County, Isaac Mutuma M’Ethingia, has announced a new initiative aimed at producing organic hair using banana stems, a move he says will create jobs, support farmers, and reduce re...

item.title: Four Tanzanians awarded Mexico World Cup trips through Mixx digital payments campaign
item.description: Four Tanzanian citizens have been rewarded with all-expenses-paid trips to Mexico after emerging winners in a promotional campaign run by digital financial services provider Mixx. The winners—Sumaiya ...

item.title: Portugal edge Croatia in VAR-filled thriller to book World Cup last-16 clash with Spain
item.description: Portugal don secure their place in the World Cup round of 16 after a very tense 2-1 win over Croatia in a match full of drama and late twists. The game, played on Thursday, was tightly contested, with...

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo reaches new milestones as Portugal edge Croatia in dramatic World Cup knockout tie
item.description: This World Cup round-up covers a series of key knockout-stage moments, headlined by Portugal’s dramatic 2-1 victory over Croatia. Cristiano Ronaldo once again made history, becoming the first player t...

item.title: EU lawmaker investigating Pegasus spyware was later targeted with the same surveillance tool
item.description: A new forensic analysis from the University of Toronto’s Citizen Lab reveals that a member of the European Parliament investigating spyware abuse was later targeted with the same technology he was scr...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif leads delegation to Iran for funeral ceremony and diplomatic visit
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has departed from Islamabad for a one-day official visit to Iran to attend the funeral rites of Iran’s late Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as reported in the new...

item.title: CNN Panel Criticizes Defense of Trump Family’s Business Ventures and Earnings
item.description: A CNN discussion became heated and at times humorous as panelists challenged conservative podcaster Ben Ferguson over his defense of the Trump family’s business activities and reported financial gains...

item.title: Researchers Identify Promising Drug Target for Motor Neurone Disease Treatment
item.description: Researchers at the University of Queensland, working with international partners, have announced a significant advance in understanding and potentially treating Motor Neurone Disease (MND). The team d...

item.title: Andy Burnham signals limited flexibility on tax policy ahead of leadership transition
item.description: Andy Burnham, who is expected to become UK Prime Minister later this month following his bid to lead the Labour Party, has indicated there is limited scope for adjustments to tax policy while maintain...

item.title: Scottish Beach Closed to Polluted Stream Water Contact Due to Contamination Warning
item.description: Authorities in Scotland have issued a public warning advising visitors to avoid contact with water from a polluted burn flowing into a beach area. The Scottish Environment Protection Agency (SEPA) has...

item.title: Chhattisgarh High Court clarifies that government school students cannot be forced to recite religious prayers
item.description: The Chhattisgarh High Court has clarified that students studying in government schools cannot be compelled to recite Hindu prayers or any religious hymns, reinforcing the constitutional principle of s...

item.title: Tanzania’s Martin Chegere promoted to Associate Professor at age 39 after strong academic performance
item.description: Martin Chegere, a Senior Lecturer at the University of Dar es Salaam (UDSM) in Tanzania, has been promoted to the rank of Associate Professor at the age of 39, marking a significant milestone in his a...

item.title: Tanzania Revenue Authority marks 30 years of growth, digital transformation and expanding tax base
item.description: The Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) has marked 30 years since its establishment, reflecting a major transformation in the country’s tax administration and revenue collection systems. When it started ...

item.title: Passenger bus accident near Balochistan–KP border leaves 40 dead, 8 injured
item.description: At least 40 people lost their lives and eight others were injured when a passenger bus travelling towards Peshawar fell into a deep ravine near the border area between Balochistan’s Sherani district a...

item.title: Riyad Mahrez Announces International Retirement After Algeria’s World Cup Exit
item.description: Riyad Mahrez has officially announced his retirement from international football following Algeria’s 2-0 defeat to Switzerland in the Round of 32 at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The match, played in Vanco...
